title.zh: 正常供水下FRO6相关叶片状态轨迹。
title.en: FRO6-associated leaf-state trajectory under well-watered conditions.

geneFunction.zh: FRO6可作为叶肉铁还原、氧化还原及光合状态的分子探针。
geneFunction.en: FRO6 can probe mesophyll iron reduction, redox balance, and photosynthetic state without implying causality.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态预计接近起始稳态。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state likely remains near its initial steady state.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞维持铁利用与叶绿体氧化还原平衡。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells maintain balanced iron use and chloroplast redox status.

tissue.zh: 叶片组织保持均一水合与稳定光合能力。
tissue.en: Leaf tissue retains uniform hydration and stable photosynthetic capacity.

trait.zh: 植株预计无可见缺水或缺铁表型。
trait.en: The plant is expected to show no visible water or iron limitation.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是起始光周期相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the initial photoperiod phase.

state.zh: FRO6状态可能出现相位依赖的轻微波动。
state.en: The FRO6 state may show modest phase-dependent fluctuation.

cell.zh: 叶肉氧化还原缓冲预计可吸收日常电子压力。
cell.en: Mesophyll redox buffering likely absorbs routine electron pressure.

tissue.zh: 叶片铁分配与光化学功能预计保持协调。
tissue.en: Leaf iron distribution and photochemical function likely remain coordinated.

trait.zh: 叶色与叶片姿态预计保持正常。
trait.en: Leaf color and posture are expected to remain normal.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是取样时的光周期相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the photoperiod phase at sampling.

state.zh: FRO6相关红氧状态预计回到稳态范围。
state.en: The FRO6-associated redox state likely remains within its steady range.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞预计维持叶绿体铁稳态。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells likely preserve chloroplast iron homeostasis.

tissue.zh: 叶片组织预计维持稳定电子传递能力。
tissue.en: Leaf tissue likely sustains stable electron transport capacity.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展预计按正常营养生长持续。
trait.en: Leaf expansion likely continues along the normal vegetative trajectory.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是起始光周期相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the initial photoperiod phase.

state.zh: FRO6状态预计完成一次日周期内的调节。
state.en: The FRO6 state likely completes phase-dependent adjustment within a daily cycle.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞预计避免持续氧化或还原偏移。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells likely avoid sustained oxidative or reductive bias.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合与铁还原功能预计保持耦合。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthesis and iron-reduction functions likely remain coupled.

trait.zh: 整体生长预计继续接近正常供水基线。
trait.en: Overall growth likely continues near the well-watered baseline.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是日周期的起始相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the starting phase of the daily cycle.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态可能再次呈轻微周期性变化。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state may again show mild cyclical variation.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞预计维持可逆的氧化还原调节。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells likely maintain reversible redox regulation.

tissue.zh: 叶片水分与光化学状态预计保持稳定。
tissue.en: Leaf hydration and photochemical status likely remain stable.

trait.zh: 预计不出现萎蔫、黄化或生长停滞。
trait.en: Wilting, chlorosis, or growth arrest is not expected.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是取样所处的明暗相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the light-dark phase at sampling.

state.zh: FRO6状态预计仍受日周期调节但无持续偏移。
state.en: The FRO6 state likely remains phase-modulated without persistent displacement.

cell.zh: 叶肉铁还原与叶绿体红氧缓冲预计保持匹配。
cell.en: Mesophyll iron reduction and chloroplast redox buffering likely remain matched.

tissue.zh: 叶片组织预计维持稳定碳同化潜力。
tissue.en: Leaf tissue likely maintains stable carbon-assimilation potential.

trait.zh: 叶片面积与颜色预计沿基线发展。
trait.en: Leaf area and color likely develop along baseline expectations.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是起始光周期相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the initial photoperiod phase.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态预计保持在生理波动范围。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state likely stays within physiological variation.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞预计无累积性铁或红氧失衡。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells likely avoid cumulative iron or redox imbalance.

tissue.zh: 叶片电子传递与气体交换预计保持协调。
tissue.en: Leaf electron transport and gas exchange likely remain coordinated.

trait.zh: 植株活力预计与正常供水对照一致。
trait.en: Plant vigor likely remains consistent with the well-watered control.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是取样时的光周期相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the photoperiod phase at sampling.

state.zh: FRO6状态预计维持第二个日周期的稳态调节。
state.en: The FRO6 state likely maintains steady regulation across a second daily cycle.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞预计持续支持叶绿体铁需求。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells likely continue supporting chloroplast iron demand.

tissue.zh: 叶片光化学效率预计无持续性下降。
tissue.en: Leaf photochemical efficiency likely shows no sustained decline.

trait.zh: 叶片外观与生长速率预计保持正常。
trait.en: Leaf appearance and growth rate likely remain normal.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是日周期的起始相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the starting phase of the daily cycle.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态可能呈下一次相位依赖波动。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state may show another phase-dependent fluctuation.

cell.zh: 叶肉红氧缓冲预计继续限制电子失衡。
cell.en: Mesophyll redox buffering likely continues limiting electron imbalance.

tissue.zh: 叶片铁稳态与水分状态预计保持稳定。
tissue.en: Leaf iron homeostasis and water status likely remain stable.

trait.zh: 预计无新发黄化或叶缘损伤。
trait.en: No emerging chlorosis or leaf-margin injury is expected.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是取样所处的明暗相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the light-dark phase at sampling.

state.zh: FRO6状态预计无累积性诱导或抑制。
state.en: The FRO6 state likely shows no cumulative induction or suppression.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞预计保持铁还原和红氧需求平衡。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells likely balance iron reduction with redox demand.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合系统预计继续接近稳态。
tissue.en: The leaf photosynthetic system likely remains near steady state.

trait.zh: 营养生长预计持续而无明显偏离。
trait.en: Vegetative growth likely continues without obvious deviation.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是起始光周期相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the initial photoperiod phase.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态预计维持可逆的周期调节。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state likely retains reversible cyclical regulation.

cell.zh: 叶肉叶绿体预计无进行性氧化还原压力。
cell.en: Mesophyll chloroplasts likely avoid progressive redox pressure.

tissue.zh: 叶片组织预计维持均衡铁利用与光合输出。
tissue.en: Leaf tissue likely maintains balanced iron use and photosynthetic output.

trait.zh: 叶片功能与外观预计保持基线水平。
trait.en: Leaf function and appearance likely remain at baseline.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是取样时的光周期相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the photoperiod phase at sampling.

state.zh: FRO6状态预计在三日后仍接近初始稳态。
state.en: The FRO6 state likely remains near its initial steady state after three days.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞预计保持铁稳态与红氧韧性。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells likely retain iron homeostasis and redox resilience.

tissue.zh: 叶片预计维持稳定光合功能且无累积损伤。
tissue.en: Leaves likely sustain photosynthetic function without cumulative injury.

trait.zh: 植株预计保持正常叶色、姿态与扩展。
trait.en: Plants likely retain normal leaf color, posture, and expansion.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是初始光周期相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the initial photoperiod phase.

readouts.zh: 测量FRO6转录本及叶片铁还原活性。
readouts.en: Measure FRO6 transcript abundance and leaf ferric-reduction activity.

readouts.zh: 测量叶绿素荧光、气体交换及叶片红氧指标。
readouts.en: Measure chlorophyll fluorescence, gas exchange, and leaf redox indicators.

readouts.zh: 测量叶肉与叶绿体相关铁分布。
readouts.en: Measure iron distribution in mesophyll and chloroplast-associated fractions.

readouts.zh: 记录叶片含水量、叶色、面积与姿态。
readouts.en: Record leaf water content, color, area, and posture.

controls.zh: 使用同基因型、同叶龄且同步取样的正常供水对照。
controls.en: Use same-genotype, same-age, time-matched well-watered controls.

controls.zh: 各时间点匹配明暗相位与营养条件。
controls.en: Match light-dark phase and nutrient conditions at every time point.

controls.zh: 加入缺铁处理作为铁响应测定的阳性参照。
controls.en: Include iron limitation as a positive reference for iron-responsive readouts.

title.zh: 持续干旱下FRO6关联的叶片状态轨迹。
title.en: FRO6-associated leaf-state trajectory under sustained drought.

geneFunction.zh: FRO6可作为叶肉铁还原与叶绿体氧化还原状态的关联探针。
geneFunction.en: FRO6 can probe leaf ferric reduction and chloroplast redox state without implying causality.

state.zh: FRO6关联的氧化还原状态接近水分充足基线。
state.en: The FRO6-associated redox state remains near the hydrated baseline as early drought signaling begins.

cell.zh: 保卫细胞可能先感知水分下降，叶肉扰动尚不明显。
cell.en: Guard cells may sense declining water availability before clear mesophyll disruption.

tissue.zh: 叶片含水与光合协调总体保持稳定。
tissue.en: Leaf hydration and photosynthetic coordination remain largely preserved.

trait.zh: 此时尚不预期出现一致的可见干旱性状。
trait.en: No consistent visible drought trait is expected yet.

text.zh: 实际叶水势下降幅度尚不明确。
text.en: The actual decline in leaf water potential is unknown.

state.zh: 随叶肉氧化还原需求改变，FRO6关联状态可能开始偏移。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state may begin shifting as mesophyll redox demand changes.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞增强氧化还原缓冲，同时气孔关闭限制碳供应。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells increase redox buffering while stomatal closure limits carbon supply.

tissue.zh: 气体交换轻度下降，但尚无明显结构损伤。
tissue.en: Gas exchange declines modestly without evident structural injury.

trait.zh: 生长可能先减慢，持续萎蔫尚不明显。
trait.en: Growth may slow before persistent wilting becomes visible.

text.zh: 初始气孔导度与蒸汽压亏缺未知。
text.en: Initial stomatal conductance and vapor-pressure deficit are unknown.

state.zh: 持续碳限制下，FRO6关联的氧化还原重塑更为可能。
state.en: FRO6-associated redox remodeling becomes more plausible under sustained carbon limitation.

cell.zh: 叶绿体电子受体压力上升，抗氧化缓冲被动员。
cell.en: Chloroplast electron-acceptor pressure rises as antioxidant buffering is recruited.

tissue.zh: 光合效率开始波动，但叶片功能仍可补偿。
tissue.en: Photosynthetic efficiency becomes variable while leaf function remains partly compensated.

trait.zh: 叶姿或短暂萎蔫可能开始偏离基线。
trait.en: Leaf angle or transient wilting may begin diverging from baseline.

text.zh: 取样时的光照相位尚未给定。
text.en: The light phase at sampling is unspecified.

state.zh: FRO6关联的铁还原与叶绿体氧化还原耦联开始偏离基线。
state.en: FRO6-associated coupling between ferric reduction and chloroplast redox balance begins diverging from baseline.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞在铁依赖电子传递与活性氧控制间权衡。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells balance iron-dependent electron transfer against reactive-oxygen control.

tissue.zh: 气孔限制与局部叶肉胁迫共同压低碳同化。
tissue.en: Stomatal limitation and localized mesophyll stress jointly suppress carbon assimilation.

trait.zh: 轻度萎蔫与叶片扩展减缓可能出现。
trait.en: Mild wilting and slower leaf expansion may appear.

text.zh: 叶片铁营养状态是主要未知条件。
text.en: Leaf iron status is the main missing condition.

state.zh: 持续缺水使FRO6关联状态转为胁迫条件化，而非短暂信号。
state.en: Sustained water deficit favors a stress-conditioned FRO6-associated state rather than a transient signal.

cell.zh: 叶绿体还原压力与活性氧清除竞争有限资源。
cell.en: Chloroplast reductive pressure and reactive-oxygen detoxification compete for limited resources.

tissue.zh: 碳同化继续下降，叶片水力恢复趋于不完全。
tissue.en: Carbon assimilation declines further as leaf hydraulic recovery becomes incomplete.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展受限，萎蔫持续时间可能延长。
trait.en: Leaf expansion is constrained and wilting may last longer.

text.zh: 干旱实际进展速度仍缺少测量。
text.en: The realized rate of drought progression remains unmeasured.

state.zh: 部分适应可能稳定FRO6关联的氧化还原处理，但不恢复基线。
state.en: Partial acclimation may stabilize FRO6-associated redox handling without restoring baseline.

cell.zh: 抗氧化与铁稳态程序缓冲叶肉氧化压力。
cell.en: Antioxidant and iron-homeostasis programs buffer mesophyll oxidative pressure.

tissue.zh: 光系统功能可能在较低水平暂时稳定。
tissue.en: Photosystem function may temporarily plateau at a reduced level.

trait.zh: 叶片生长持续受限，但损伤未必明显加重。
trait.en: Leaf growth remains constrained without necessarily showing rapid injury progression.

text.zh: 叶龄差异可能改变适应能力。
text.en: Leaf age may substantially alter acclimation capacity.

state.zh: 若缺水继续加深，FRO6关联状态可能由补偿转向失衡。
state.en: If drought deepens, the FRO6-associated state may shift from compensation toward dysfunction.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞面临更强的活性氧与游离铁失衡。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells face stronger reactive-oxygen and labile-iron imbalance.

tissue.zh: 光化学效率下降，早期衰老信号可能出现。
tissue.en: Photochemical efficiency declines and early senescence signaling may emerge.

trait.zh: 持续卷曲或萎蔫可能比早期更明显。
trait.en: Persistent curling or wilting may become more apparent.

text.zh: 实际叶水势是否跨越损伤阈值未知。
text.en: Whether leaf water potential crosses an injury threshold is unknown.

state.zh: FRO6关联的铁还原能力可能与叶绿体需求逐渐脱耦。
state.en: FRO6-associated ferric-reduction capacity may become uncoupled from chloroplast demand.

cell.zh: 膜氧化压力增加，叶绿体修复能力受到限制。
cell.en: Membrane oxidative pressure increases while chloroplast repair capacity becomes constrained.

tissue.zh: 叶内出现空间异质的光合功能下降。
tissue.en: Spatially heterogeneous photosynthetic impairment develops across the leaf.

trait.zh: 萎蔫可能更难恢复，叶片扩展接近停滞。
trait.en: Wilting may become less reversible as leaf expansion approaches arrest.

text.zh: 叶片内缺水的空间分布尚不明确。
text.en: The spatial distribution of water deficit within the leaf is unknown.

state.zh: 补偿性氧化还原程序可能维持较低功能的FRO6关联状态。
state.en: Compensatory redox programs may maintain a lower-functioning FRO6-associated state.

cell.zh: 存活叶肉细胞优先控制活性氧，而非最大化电子传递。
cell.en: Surviving mesophyll cells prioritize reactive-oxygen control over maximal electron transport.

tissue.zh: 叶片以有限修复维持降低的光合能力。
tissue.en: The leaf maintains reduced photosynthesis with limited repair.

trait.zh: 生长停滞与叶色变淡可能开始出现。
trait.en: Growth arrest and paler coloration may begin to emerge.

text.zh: 抗氧化储备的初始水平未知。
text.en: The initial antioxidant reserve is unknown.

state.zh: 累积干旱使FRO6关联状态难以自行回到水合基线。
state.en: Cumulative drought makes spontaneous return to the hydrated FRO6-associated state unlikely.

cell.zh: 长期活性氧负担增加膜与叶绿体的脆弱性。
cell.en: Prolonged reactive-oxygen burden increases membrane and chloroplast vulnerability.

tissue.zh: 水力与光合限制开始相互强化。
tissue.en: Hydraulic and photosynthetic limitations increasingly reinforce each other.

trait.zh: 持续萎蔫与早期失绿变得更为可能。
trait.en: Sustained wilting and early chlorosis become more plausible.

text.zh: 土壤与叶片水分关系尚未量化。
text.en: The soil-to-leaf water relationship has not been quantified.

state.zh: FRO6关联的铁氧化还原失衡可能标记叶肉韧性下降。
state.en: FRO6-associated iron-redox imbalance may mark declining mesophyll resilience.

cell.zh: 部分细胞失去氧化还原稳态，另一些仍保持适应。
cell.en: Some cells lose redox homeostasis while others remain acclimated.

tissue.zh: 叶片功能异质性扩大，受压区域下降更强。
tissue.en: Leaf functional heterogeneity expands with stronger decline in stressed regions.

trait.zh: 失绿与卷曲可能更一致，但并非必然出现。
trait.en: Chlorosis and curling may become more consistent but remain non-obligate.

text.zh: 细胞间胁迫异质性缺少空间测量。
text.en: Spatial measurements of cell-to-cell stress heterogeneity are missing.

state.zh: 终点可能呈现兼具适应与损伤的FRO6关联干旱状态。
state.en: The endpoint may show a drought-conditioned FRO6-associated state combining acclimation and injury.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞群分化为缓冲型与氧化还原受损型。
cell.en: Mesophyll populations separate into buffered and redox-compromised states.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合能力与水力功能持续低于基线。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic capacity and hydraulic function remain below baseline.

trait.zh: 持久生长抑制、萎蔫及可能失绿构成终点表型。
trait.en: Persistent growth suppression, wilting, and possible chlorosis characterize the endpoint.

text.zh: 最终干旱强度与组织存活范围未知。
text.en: Final drought severity and the extent of tissue survival are unknown.

readouts.zh: 按时间点测量叶片FRO6转录、蛋白与铁螯合物还原活性。
readouts.en: Measure leaf FRO6 transcript, protein, and ferric-chelate reduction activity across horizons.

readouts.zh: 在匹配光照相位测量叶绿素荧光、气体交换与氧化还原报告信号。
readouts.en: Measure chlorophyll fluorescence, gas exchange, and redox reporters at matched light phases.

readouts.zh: 同步记录叶水势、相对含水量、气孔导度与土壤含水量。
readouts.en: Track leaf water potential, relative water content, stomatal conductance, and soil moisture.

readouts.zh: 测量叶肉活性氧、脂质氧化、游离铁与抗氧化能力。
readouts.en: Quantify mesophyll reactive oxygen, lipid oxidation, labile iron, and antioxidant capacity.

controls.zh: 使用同基因型、同叶龄、同取样相位的充分灌水对照。
controls.en: Use well-watered controls matched for genotype, leaf age, and sampling phase.

controls.zh: 匹配营养、温度、湿度、光照与蒸汽压亏缺。
controls.en: Match nutrition, temperature, humidity, light, and vapor-pressure deficit.

controls.zh: 设置铁状态对照以区分干旱效应与铁限制。
controls.en: Include iron-status controls to distinguish drought responses from iron limitation.

title.zh: FRO6标记的叶片干旱复水轨迹。
title.en: FRO6 marks a leaf drought–rewatering trajectory.

geneFunction.zh: FRO6可作为叶肉铁还原、氧化还原及光合状态的分子探针。
geneFunction.en: FRO6 can probe mesophyll iron reduction, redox balance, and photosynthetic state.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态开始偏向缺水诱导的氧化还原调节。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state begins shifting toward drought-responsive redox regulation.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞轻度失水，叶绿体电子平衡压力上升。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells mildly dehydrate as chloroplast electron-balance pressure rises.

tissue.zh: 叶片气孔限制初现，但光合组织仍大致协调。
tissue.en: Stomatal limitation begins while photosynthetic tissues remain broadly coordinated.

trait.zh: 叶片蒸腾和碳同化可能开始温和下降。
trait.en: Leaf transpiration and carbon assimilation may begin modest declines.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是初始光周期相位未知。
text.en: The key ambiguity is the unspecified initial photoperiod phase.

state.zh: FRO6相关红氧状态更明显地反映持续缺水。
state.en: The FRO6-associated redox state more clearly reflects continuing water deficit.

cell.zh: 叶肉铁还原需求与活性氧缓冲可能同步调整。
cell.en: Mesophyll iron-reduction demand and reactive-oxygen buffering may adjust together.

tissue.zh: 叶片内部光合活性开始呈现空间差异。
tissue.en: Photosynthetic activity begins becoming spatially heterogeneous across the leaf.

trait.zh: 气孔导度下降，叶片温度可能轻度升高。
trait.en: Stomatal conductance declines, and leaf temperature may rise slightly.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是实际叶片水势。
text.en: The key missing condition is actual leaf water potential.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态进入较强的缺水型红氧重塑。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state enters stronger drought-like redox remodeling.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞维持光化学时更依赖抗氧化缓冲。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells rely more heavily on antioxidant buffering to sustain photochemistry.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合能力受限，受光区域可能更敏感。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic capacity is constrained, with illuminated regions potentially more sensitive.

trait.zh: 碳同化进一步下降，并可能出现轻微萎蔫。
trait.en: Carbon assimilation falls further, with mild wilting potentially emerging.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是叶片所受光强。
text.en: The key missing condition is incident light intensity.

state.zh: 复水刚发生时，FRO6相关状态仍保留干旱印记。
state.en: Immediately after rewatering, the FRO6-associated state still retains a drought imprint.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞开始回补水分，但红氧网络尚未复位。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells begin rehydrating, while redox networks remain unrecovered.

tissue.zh: 叶片水力状态先改善，光合组织恢复相对滞后。
tissue.en: Leaf hydraulics improve first, while photosynthetic tissue recovery lags.

trait.zh: 膨压可能回升，但气体交换尚未完全恢复。
trait.en: Turgor may improve, but gas exchange remains incompletely restored.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是复水后的准确采样间隔。
text.en: The key ambiguity is the exact interval between rewatering and sampling.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态转向复水后的早期红氧再平衡。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state shifts toward early post-rewatering redox rebalancing.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞水分恢复，并处理再供水相关氧化波动。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells regain water while managing rehydration-associated oxidative fluctuations.

tissue.zh: 叶片水力均一性改善，光合恢复仍不完全。
tissue.en: Leaf hydraulic uniformity improves, although photosynthetic recovery remains incomplete.

trait.zh: 萎蔫减轻，气孔导度可能开始回升。
trait.en: Wilting lessens, and stomatal conductance may begin recovering.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是复水后土壤含水量。
text.en: The key missing condition is soil water content after rewatering.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态继续恢复，但可能出现短暂红氧过冲。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state continues recovering but may show a transient redox overshoot.

cell.zh: 叶绿体电子传递重启，抗氧化需求仍可能偏高。
cell.en: Chloroplast electron transport resumes while antioxidant demand may remain elevated.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合区域重新协调，但局部损伤可能持续。
tissue.en: Photosynthetic regions regain coordination, although localized impairment may persist.

trait.zh: 净光合回升，叶温与蒸腾逐步接近基线。
trait.en: Net photosynthesis rises as leaf temperature and transpiration approach baseline.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是干旱期间的光抑制程度。
text.en: The key uncertainty is the extent of photoinhibition during drought.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态趋向稳定，但仍带有复水记忆。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state trends toward stability while retaining rewatering memory.

cell.zh: 叶肉红氧缓冲趋稳，铁还原需求可能重新校准。
cell.en: Mesophyll redox buffering stabilizes as iron-reduction demand may recalibrate.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合功能多数恢复，组织间差异逐渐缩小。
tissue.en: Most leaf photosynthetic function recovers as tissue heterogeneity narrows.

trait.zh: 气体交换明显改善，但未必完全回到基线。
trait.en: Gas exchange improves substantially but may not fully return to baseline.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是叶片铁营养状态。
text.en: The key missing condition is leaf iron nutritional status.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态接近恢复平台，并保留轻度应激印记。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state approaches a recovery plateau with a mild stress imprint.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞稳态增强，残余氧化压力可能仍可检测。
cell.en: Mesophyll homeostasis strengthens, while residual oxidative pressure may remain detectable.

tissue.zh: 叶片光化学效率趋稳，局部恢复速度仍可能不同。
tissue.en: Leaf photochemical efficiency stabilizes, though local recovery rates may still differ.

trait.zh: 叶片姿态恢复，生长恢复可能晚于光合恢复。
trait.en: Leaf posture recovers, while growth may lag behind photosynthetic recovery.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是被测叶片的发育年龄。
text.en: The key missing condition is the developmental age of the sampled leaf.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态形成复水后的适应性稳态。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state forms a post-rewatering adaptive steady state.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞红氧稳态恢复，但调节设定点可能改变。
cell.en: Mesophyll redox homeostasis returns, although its regulatory set point may differ.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合网络基本协调，并保留轻微历史效应。
tissue.en: The leaf photosynthetic network is largely coordinated with a minor history effect.

trait.zh: 碳同化接近基线，扩展生长可能仍稍受抑制。
trait.en: Carbon assimilation nears baseline, while expansion growth may remain slightly constrained.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是复水后的昼夜相位。
text.en: The key ambiguity is circadian phase after rewatering.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态维持适应稳态，并可能随光周期振荡。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state maintains adaptation and may oscillate with the photoperiod.

cell.zh: 叶肉铁还原与叶绿体红氧需求再次协调。
cell.en: Mesophyll iron reduction and chloroplast redox demand become coordinated again.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合组织整体稳定，残余异质性继续减弱。
tissue.en: Photosynthetic tissues remain stable as residual heterogeneity continues diminishing.

trait.zh: 蒸腾和光合接近正常，但生长补偿仍有限。
trait.en: Transpiration and photosynthesis approach normal, while growth compensation remains limited.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是测量时的光暗状态。
text.en: The key missing condition is light or dark status during measurement.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态继续稳定，但不代表干旱效应已消失。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state remains stable without implying that drought effects have vanished.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞保持红氧平衡，修复过程可能仍在进行。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells maintain redox balance while repair processes may continue.

tissue.zh: 叶片功能接近基线，先前受损区域可能仍偏弱。
tissue.en: Leaf function approaches baseline, though previously impaired regions may remain weaker.

trait.zh: 可见萎蔫应消退，生物量差异可能尚未弥补。
trait.en: Visible wilting should recede, while biomass differences may remain uncompensated.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是干旱造成的不可逆损伤。
text.en: The key uncertainty is irreversible damage caused during drought.

state.zh: FRO6相关状态达到稳定恢复或轻度适应终点。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state reaches a stable recovery or mildly adapted endpoint.

cell.zh: 叶肉红氧与铁还原功能大体重建，但未必完全复原。
cell.en: Mesophyll redox and iron-reduction functions are largely rebuilt but not necessarily restored exactly.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合系统总体恢复，并保留有限应激记忆。
tissue.en: The leaf photosynthetic system broadly recovers while retaining limited stress memory.

trait.zh: 生理表现接近基线，但累计生长损失可能持续。
trait.en: Physiological performance nears baseline, while cumulative growth loss may persist.

text.zh: 最关键的不确定性是后续供水是否持续充足。
text.en: The key missing condition is whether adequate watering was sustained.

readouts.zh: 测量FRO6转录本或启动子报告信号的时间序列。
readouts.en: Measure time-resolved FRO6 transcripts or promoter-reporter signal.

readouts.zh: 测量叶片铁还原活性及可利用铁状态。
readouts.en: Measure leaf ferric-reduction activity and bioavailable iron status.

readouts.zh: 检测叶肉活性氧、抗氧化状态及氧化还原比值。
readouts.en: Assay mesophyll reactive oxygen species, antioxidant status, and redox ratios.

readouts.zh: 记录叶绿素荧光、净光合和气孔导度。
readouts.en: Record chlorophyll fluorescence, net photosynthesis, and stomatal conductance.

controls.zh: 设置同时间点、同光相且持续充分供水的对照。
controls.en: Use continuously watered controls matched by time and light phase.

controls.zh: 设置经历相同干旱但不复水的时间匹配对照。
controls.en: Use time-matched drought controls without rewatering.

controls.zh: 匹配叶龄、叶位、营养和起始含水状态。
controls.en: Match leaf age, position, nutrition, and initial water status.

title.zh: FRO6关联的叶片冷适应轨迹。
title.en: FRO6-associated trajectory of leaf cold acclimation.

geneFunction.zh: FRO6可作为叶肉铁还原、叶绿体氧化还原与光合状态的分子探针。
geneFunction.en: FRO6 can probe mesophyll iron reduction, chloroplast redox balance, and photosynthetic state without implying causality.

state.zh: FRO6关联状态开始反映冷感知与铁氧化还原需求变化。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state begins reflecting cold perception and changing iron-redox demand.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞快速调整钙、活性氧与膜氧化还原信号。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells rapidly adjust calcium, reactive oxygen, and membrane redox signaling.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合电子传递可能短暂受限。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic electron transport may become transiently constrained.

trait.zh: 叶片外观预计基本不变。
trait.en: Leaf appearance is expected to remain largely unchanged.

text.zh: 初始光周期相位尚未给定。
text.en: The initial photoperiod phase is unspecified.

state.zh: FRO6状态提示铁还原与抗氧化调节正在重排。
state.en: The FRO6 state suggests ongoing reorganization of iron reduction and antioxidant regulation.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞加强光保护并限制过度还原。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells enhance photoprotection while limiting excessive reduction.

tissue.zh: 叶片碳同化可能下降并呈现光相依赖。
tissue.en: Leaf carbon assimilation may decline in a light-phase-dependent manner.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展可能开始轻微放缓。
trait.en: Leaf expansion may begin to slow slightly.

text.zh: 采样时的明暗相位尚不明确。
text.en: The light-dark phase at sampling remains unknown.

state.zh: FRO6关联状态进一步偏向持续冷诱导的铁氧化还原平衡。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state shifts further toward sustained cold-linked iron-redox balancing.

cell.zh: 叶绿体可能提高耗散以缓冲电子压力。
cell.en: Chloroplasts may increase energy dissipation to buffer electron pressure.

tissue.zh: 叶片光化学效率与气体交换可能同步受抑。
tissue.en: Leaf photochemical efficiency and gas exchange may be jointly constrained.

trait.zh: 可见损伤仍不太可能出现。
trait.en: Visible injury remains unlikely under non-freezing conditions.

text.zh: 实际冷处理温度尚未说明。
text.en: The exact cold-treatment temperature is unspecified.

state.zh: FRO6状态表明叶肉铁利用与氧化还原稳态已明显偏离基线。
state.en: The FRO6 state indicates mesophyll iron use and redox homeostasis now differ clearly from baseline.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞协调铁供应、抗氧化与光系统保护。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells coordinate iron supply, antioxidant capacity, and photosystem protection.

tissue.zh: 叶片形成持续但可能可逆的低光合状态。
tissue.en: The leaf enters a sustained but potentially reversible low-photosynthesis state.

trait.zh: 叶片生长速率可能出现可辨减缓。
trait.en: Leaf growth rate may show a discernible slowdown.

text.zh: 基线叶片年龄尚未精确匹配。
text.en: Exact baseline leaf age is not specified.

state.zh: FRO6关联状态开始显示补偿性铁还原与氧化还原调节。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state begins showing compensatory iron-reduction and redox regulation.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞可能稳定叶绿体电子流并增强清除能力。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells may stabilize chloroplast electron flow and strengthen reactive-species clearance.

tissue.zh: 叶片光保护增强，但碳增益仍受限制。
tissue.en: Leaf photoprotection strengthens while carbon gain remains limited.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展滞后可能逐渐累积。
trait.en: A lag in leaf expansion may gradually accumulate.

text.zh: 叶片初始铁储量尚不明确。
text.en: Initial leaf iron reserves remain unknown.

state.zh: FRO6状态趋向冷适应型铁与氧化还原平衡。
state.en: The FRO6 state trends toward a cold-acclimating iron and redox balance.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞降低氧化负荷并维持必要铁供应。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells reduce oxidative burden while maintaining necessary iron supply.

tissue.zh: 叶片光化学可能部分稳定在较低水平。
tissue.en: Leaf photochemistry may partially stabilize at a lower level.

trait.zh: 叶片保持完整，但生长仍慢于基线。
trait.en: Leaves remain intact, but growth stays slower than baseline.

text.zh: 此时的光周期相位尚未给定。
text.en: The photoperiod phase at this point is unspecified.

state.zh: FRO6关联状态维持补偿性铁还原与叶绿体氧化还原控制。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state maintains compensatory iron reduction and chloroplast redox control.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞可能以更高代谢成本维持光系统。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells may maintain photosystems at a higher metabolic cost.

tissue.zh: 叶片内氧化还原差异可能趋于减小。
tissue.en: Within-leaf redox heterogeneity may begin to decrease.

trait.zh: 叶色预计仍稳定，扩展持续偏慢。
trait.en: Leaf color likely remains stable while expansion stays slow.

text.zh: 叶肉细胞间的冷暴露均一性未知。
text.en: Uniformity of cold exposure across mesophyll cells is unknown.

state.zh: FRO6状态进入持续冷下的相对稳定平台。
state.en: The FRO6 state approaches a relative plateau under sustained cold.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞在铁供给与光保护间形成新平衡。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells establish a new balance between iron provision and photoprotection.

tissue.zh: 叶片维持受限但较稳定的光合功能。
tissue.en: The leaf maintains constrained but comparatively stable photosynthetic function.

trait.zh: 生长滞后明显，但不预示组织坏死。
trait.en: Growth lag becomes evident without necessarily indicating tissue necrosis.

text.zh: 实际叶面光强尚未说明。
text.en: Actual irradiance at the leaf surface is unspecified.

state.zh: FRO6关联状态继续支持冷适应型铁氧化还原管理。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state continues supporting cold-acclimated iron-redox management.

cell.zh: 叶绿体可能维持较强耗散并限制氧化损伤。
cell.en: Chloroplasts may sustain stronger dissipation while limiting oxidative damage.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合节律仍可能随明暗周期波动。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic performance may still oscillate with the light-dark cycle.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展持续受限，外观大体正常。
trait.en: Leaf expansion remains restricted while overall appearance stays normal.

text.zh: 采样相对明暗转换的时间未知。
text.en: Sampling time relative to light-dark transitions is unknown.

state.zh: FRO6状态显示适应已稳定，但资源成本可能持续。
state.en: The FRO6 state suggests stable acclimation with continuing resource costs.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞维持铁稳态与抗氧化周转。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells maintain iron homeostasis and antioxidant turnover.

tissue.zh: 叶片可能保持较低碳同化与有限恢复空间。
tissue.en: The leaf may retain lower carbon assimilation with limited recovery capacity.

trait.zh: 叶片生物量积累继续落后于基线。
trait.en: Leaf biomass accumulation continues to lag behind baseline.

text.zh: 冷处理下的实际营养可利用性未知。
text.en: Actual nutrient availability during cold treatment is unknown.

state.zh: FRO6关联状态维持长期冷下的叶肉氧化还原稳态。
state.en: The FRO6-associated state maintains mesophyll redox homeostasis during prolonged cold.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞可能避免进一步电子失衡。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells may avoid further electron imbalance.

tissue.zh: 叶片功能趋稳，但仍低于温暖对照。
tissue.en: Leaf function stabilizes but remains below the warm control.

trait.zh: 叶片完整性保持，生长差距继续累积。
trait.en: Leaf integrity is maintained while the growth gap continues accumulating.

text.zh: 叶片发育位置尚未精确指定。
text.en: The leaf developmental position is not precisely specified.

state.zh: FRO6状态代表持续冷下稳定但非基线的铁氧化还原状态。
state.en: The FRO6 state represents a stable but non-baseline iron-redox condition under sustained cold.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞维持适应性铁利用与叶绿体保护。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells maintain acclimated iron use and chloroplast protection.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合能力保持受限而无明显崩溃。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic capacity remains limited without clear functional collapse.

trait.zh: 最终表现为生长减缓而非严重冷害。
trait.en: The expected outcome is slowed growth rather than severe chilling injury.

text.zh: 长期采样的光周期相位仍不明确。
text.en: Photoperiod phase across the prolonged sampling series remains unresolved.

readouts.zh: 测定叶片及叶肉FRO6转录本、蛋白与铁还原酶活性。
readouts.en: Measure FRO6 transcript, protein, and ferric-reductase activity in leaves and enriched mesophyll.

readouts.zh: 同步测量叶绿体氧化还原状态、活性氧与抗氧化能力。
readouts.en: Track chloroplast redox state, reactive oxygen, and antioxidant capacity in parallel.

readouts.zh: 记录光系统效率、非光化学猝灭、电子传递与气体交换。
readouts.en: Record photosystem efficiency, nonphotochemical quenching, electron transport, and gas exchange.

readouts.zh: 量化叶片铁库、叶绿素、扩展速率与可见损伤。
readouts.en: Quantify leaf iron pools, chlorophyll, expansion rate, and visible injury.

controls.zh: 设置同基因型、同叶龄、同光周期相位的温暖对照。
controls.en: Use warm controls matched for genotype, leaf age, and photoperiod phase.

controls.zh: 在各时间点设置冷处理与温暖处理的平行取样。
controls.en: Collect parallel cold-treated and warm samples at every matched time point.

controls.zh: 采用FRO6缺失与互补材料区分状态关联和机制贡献。
controls.en: Use FRO6 loss and complementation lines to distinguish state association from mechanistic contribution.

title.zh: 正常供水下CBF3关联状态轨迹

geneFunction.zh: CBF3是冷响应转录因子，可协调低温驯化与生长权衡。
geneFunction.en: CBF3 is a cold-responsive transcription factor coordinating acclimation programs and growth tradeoffs.

state.zh: CBF3预计维持低基础活性，未见持续冷响应信号。
state.en: CBF3 likely remains at low basal activity without sustained cold-response signaling.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞保持常态代谢，防寒转录程序未明显启动。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells retain routine metabolism without clear activation of acclimation transcription.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合与水分状态预计接近正常基线。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic and water status should remain near the normal baseline.

trait.zh: 叶片外观与早期生长预计无可辨变化。
trait.en: Leaf appearance and early growth should show no discernible change.

text.zh: 起始昼夜时相未知，限制对基础波动的判断。
text.en: The unknown starting circadian phase limits interpretation of basal fluctuations.

state.zh: CBF3可能出现昼夜门控波动，但不指示冷驯化。
state.en: CBF3 may show circadian-gated fluctuation without indicating cold acclimation.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞的胁迫防御状态仍接近未诱导水平。
cell.en: Mesophyll stress-defense state likely remains near its uninduced level.

tissue.zh: 叶片气体交换与膨压预计保持稳定。
tissue.en: Leaf gas exchange and turgor are expected to remain stable.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展与颜色预计延续对照轨迹。
trait.en: Leaf expansion and coloration should follow the control trajectory.

text.zh: 起始昼夜时相未知，无法定位CBF3波峰。
text.en: The unknown starting circadian phase prevents locating a CBF3 peak.

state.zh: 若无温度下降，CBF3关联状态应回归低背景范围。
state.en: Without a temperature drop, the CBF3-associated state should remain within a low background range.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞继续优先支持光合与生长代谢。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells continue prioritizing photosynthetic and growth metabolism.

tissue.zh: 叶片整体未预期形成防寒相关生理重塑。
tissue.en: The leaf is not expected to develop acclimation-related physiological remodeling.

trait.zh: 可见生长与叶姿预计保持正常。
trait.en: Visible growth and leaf posture should remain normal.

text.zh: 实际叶温未知，可能影响低水平CBF3信号。
text.en: Actual leaf temperature is unknown and could affect low-level CBF3 signaling.

state.zh: 首个周期后，CBF3仍应表现为非持续诱导状态。
state.en: After the first cycle, CBF3 should still show no sustained induction.

cell.zh: 细胞防寒效应基因网络预计保持基础配置。
cell.en: Cellular acclimation effector networks likely retain their basal configuration.

tissue.zh: 叶片光化学效率与含水状态预计稳定。
tissue.en: Leaf photochemical efficiency and hydration should remain stable.

trait.zh: 叶片大小与形态预计不偏离匹配对照。
trait.en: Leaf size and morphology should not diverge from matched controls.

text.zh: 实际叶温未知，限制排除轻微冷刺激。
text.en: Actual leaf temperature is unknown, limiting exclusion of mild chilling.

state.zh: CBF3可随昼夜节律短暂变化，但缺乏持续放大。
state.en: CBF3 may vary transiently with circadian regulation but lacks sustained amplification.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞仍处于稳态而非冷驯化状态。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells remain homeostatic rather than cold-acclimated.

tissue.zh: 叶片碳同化与蒸腾预计沿正常日变化运行。
tissue.en: Leaf carbon assimilation and transpiration should follow normal daily variation.

trait.zh: 叶片生长速率预计与正常供水对照一致。
trait.en: Leaf growth rate should remain comparable to the well-watered control.

text.zh: 起始昼夜时相未知，限制短暂波动归因。
text.en: The unknown starting circadian phase limits attribution of transient variation.

state.zh: CBF3关联转录状态预计继续受限于基础范围。
state.en: The CBF3-associated transcriptional state likely remains confined to its basal range.

cell.zh: 细胞膜与渗透保护程序预计无明显增强。
cell.en: Cellular membrane and osmoprotective programs should show no clear enhancement.

tissue.zh: 叶片组织功能预计保持稳态且无胁迫积累。
tissue.en: Leaf tissue function should remain stable without accumulating stress.

trait.zh: 叶片颜色、姿态与扩展预计维持正常。
trait.en: Leaf color, posture, and expansion should remain normal.

text.zh: 实际叶温未知，是判断隐性冷响应的关键。
text.en: Actual leaf temperature is the key ambiguity for detecting covert cold responses.

state.zh: 进入后续周期后，CBF3仍不应形成稳定诱导。
state.en: In the subsequent cycle, CBF3 should still lack stable induction.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞维持生长型转录与能量分配。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells maintain growth-oriented transcription and energy allocation.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合系统预计无防寒性重设。
tissue.en: The leaf photosynthetic system should show no acclimation-related resetting.

trait.zh: 植株叶片表现预计继续接近基线。
trait.en: Plant leaf performance should continue near baseline.

text.zh: 起始昼夜时相未知，妨碍跨周期相位比较。
text.en: The unknown starting circadian phase hinders cross-cycle phase comparison.

state.zh: CBF3信号预计保持低水平并重复背景节律。
state.en: CBF3 signaling likely stays low while repeating background rhythmic variation.

cell.zh: 细胞抗冻准备度预计仍低且未持续积累。
cell.en: Cellular freezing preparedness likely remains low without sustained accumulation.

tissue.zh: 叶片水分平衡与碳代谢预计保持正常。
tissue.en: Leaf water balance and carbon metabolism should remain normal.

trait.zh: 叶片生长与外观预计无新的偏离。
trait.en: Leaf growth and appearance should show no new divergence.

text.zh: 实际叶温未知，可能改变背景节律幅度。
text.en: Actual leaf temperature is unknown and may alter the amplitude of background rhythms.

state.zh: CBF3关联状态仍应反映基础调控而非胁迫记忆。
state.en: The CBF3-associated state should still reflect basal regulation rather than stress memory.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞未预期积累显著冷保护状态。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells are not expected to accumulate a substantial cold-protective state.

tissue.zh: 叶片组织预计维持正常光合与生长协调。
tissue.en: Leaf tissue should maintain normal coordination of photosynthesis and growth.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展轨迹预计持续匹配对照。
trait.en: Leaf expansion should continue matching the control trajectory.

text.zh: 实际叶温未知，限制对低强度冷信号的排除。
text.en: Actual leaf temperature is unknown, limiting exclusion of weak chilling signals.

state.zh: CBF3可能再次呈节律波动，但不应持续升高。
state.en: CBF3 may again fluctuate rhythmically but should not remain elevated.

cell.zh: 细胞状态预计继续偏向日常代谢而非防御。
cell.en: Cell state should remain oriented toward routine metabolism rather than defense.

tissue.zh: 叶片生理输出预计保持在正常日变化内。
tissue.en: Leaf physiological output should remain within normal daily variation.

trait.zh: 可见叶片性状预计维持稳定。
trait.en: Visible leaf traits should remain stable.

text.zh: 起始昼夜时相未知，无法确认重复波动的相位。
text.en: The unknown starting circadian phase prevents confirming the phase of repeated fluctuations.

state.zh: 在无冷刺激下，CBF3网络预计不发生累积性偏移。
state.en: Without chilling, the CBF3 network should show no cumulative shift.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞继续保持非驯化稳态。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells continue in a non-acclimated steady state.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合能力与组织含水量预计接近基线。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic capacity and tissue hydration should remain near baseline.

trait.zh: 叶片生物量增加预计符合正常供水条件。
trait.en: Leaf biomass gain should remain consistent with well-watered conditions.

text.zh: 实际叶温未知，仍是累积响应判断的主要缺口。
text.en: Actual leaf temperature remains the main gap when assessing cumulative responses.

state.zh: 轨迹末端CBF3预计仍低，仅保留可能的节律变化。
state.en: At the trajectory endpoint, CBF3 likely remains low with only possible rhythmic variation.

cell.zh: 细胞未形成持久冷驯化或防御优先状态。
cell.en: Cells should not develop persistent cold acclimation or defense prioritization.

tissue.zh: 叶片功能预计保持稳态，无渐进性胁迫征象。
tissue.en: Leaf function should remain stable without progressive stress signatures.

trait.zh: 叶片形态、生长与颜色预计持续正常。
trait.en: Leaf morphology, growth, and color should remain normal.

text.zh: 实际叶温未知，限制最终排除轻度冷暴露。
text.en: Actual leaf temperature is unknown, limiting final exclusion of mild chilling exposure.

readouts.zh: 测量CBF3转录本及典型冷响应靶基因的时间序列。
readouts.en: Measure time-resolved CBF3 transcripts and representative cold-response target genes.

readouts.zh: 同步记录叶温、气孔导度与叶片含水状态。
readouts.en: Record leaf temperature, stomatal conductance, and leaf water status concurrently.

readouts.zh: 测定叶绿素荧光、气体交换与叶片扩展。
readouts.en: Measure chlorophyll fluorescence, gas exchange, and leaf expansion.

controls.zh: 使用同基因型、同叶龄且同步取样的正常供水对照。
controls.en: Use same-genotype, age-matched, time-matched well-watered controls.

controls.zh: 设置温和低温处理作为CBF3响应阳性参照。
controls.en: Include a mild chilling treatment as a positive reference for CBF3 responsiveness.

controls.zh: 跨完整光暗周期取样以区分节律与环境效应。
controls.en: Sample across complete light-dark cycles to separate rhythmic from environmental effects.

title.zh: 持续干旱下叶片CBF3关联状态轨迹
title.en: Leaf CBF3-associated trajectory under sustained drought

geneFunction.zh: CBF3是冷响应转录因子，可能标记与脱水交叉的适应程序，但不证明其因果作用。
geneFunction.en: CBF3 is a cold-response transcription factor that may mark overlapping dehydration programs without establishing causality.

state.zh: 早期脱水信号出现，CBF3关联转录状态可能仅轻微偏移。
state.en: Early dehydration signaling emerges, while the CBF3-associated transcriptional state may shift only slightly.

cell.zh: 保卫细胞开始感知水分下降，叶肉细胞氧化还原负荷仍低。
cell.en: Guard cells begin sensing water loss, while mesophyll redox burden remains low.

tissue.zh: 叶片含水量大致维持，气孔调节可能先于组织脱水。
tissue.en: Leaf hydration is largely maintained, with stomatal adjustment potentially preceding tissue dehydration.

trait.zh: 植株外观接近基线，生长变化尚不明显。
trait.en: Plant appearance remains near baseline, with little evident growth change.

text.zh: 初始昼夜节律相位未给出。
text.en: The initial circadian phase is unspecified.

state.zh: 脱水响应增强，CBF3关联调控网络可能进入预备状态。
state.en: Dehydration responses strengthen, and the CBF3-associated regulatory network may enter a primed state.

cell.zh: 保卫细胞关闭倾向增强，叶肉细胞开始调整渗透与抗氧化过程。
cell.en: Guard-cell closure increases as mesophyll cells begin adjusting osmotic and antioxidant processes.

tissue.zh: 蒸腾下降可能限制失水，同时轻度抑制碳同化。
tissue.en: Reduced transpiration may limit water loss while mildly constraining carbon assimilation.

trait.zh: 可见萎蔫仍有限，但叶片扩展可能开始减慢。
trait.en: Visible wilting remains limited, although leaf expansion may begin slowing.

text.zh: 实际叶水势下降速率未知。
text.en: The actual rate of leaf water-potential decline is unknown.

state.zh: CBF3关联状态可能与渗透保护及活性氧缓冲程序重叠。
state.en: The CBF3-associated state may overlap with osmoprotective and reactive-oxygen buffering programs.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞增加保护性代谢，气孔导度进一步降低。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells increase protective metabolism as stomatal conductance declines further.

tissue.zh: 叶片水分保存改善，但光合能力开始受到可测限制。
tissue.en: Leaf water conservation improves, but photosynthetic capacity begins showing measurable constraint.

trait.zh: 生长减速可能出现，叶色和姿态仍接近正常。
trait.en: Growth slowing may emerge while leaf color and posture remain near normal.

text.zh: 叶片蒸汽压亏缺未提供。
text.en: Leaf vapor-pressure deficit is not provided.

state.zh: 持续脱水使CBF3关联防护状态更清晰，但其强度仍依赖环境背景。
state.en: Sustained dehydration clarifies the CBF3-associated protective state, although its strength remains context dependent.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞加强渗透调节，氧化还原压力开始累积。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells strengthen osmotic adjustment as redox pressure begins accumulating.

tissue.zh: 气孔限制明显，叶片碳获取与水分保存形成权衡。
tissue.en: Stomatal limitation becomes evident, creating a tradeoff between leaf carbon gain and water conservation.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展受抑，轻微失水姿态可能出现。
trait.en: Leaf expansion is suppressed, and mild dehydration posture may appear.

text.zh: 该时点叶水势尚未测定。
text.en: Leaf water potential at this horizon is unmeasured.

state.zh: CBF3关联转录程序可能持续，并与广泛干旱网络发生交叉调控。
state.en: The CBF3-associated program may persist and intersect with broader drought regulatory networks.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞维持保护物质积累，同时降低高耗能合成活动。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells maintain protectant accumulation while reducing energy-intensive biosynthesis.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合速率进一步下降，组织含水量仍受部分保护。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthesis declines further while tissue hydration remains partly protected.

trait.zh: 生物量积累减慢，叶片轻度卷曲可能可见。
trait.en: Biomass accumulation slows, and mild leaf curling may become visible.

text.zh: 干旱处理的土壤含水曲线未知。
text.en: The soil-moisture trajectory of the drought treatment is unknown.

state.zh: 防护状态趋于稳定，但CBF3关联信号可能被能量限制所约束。
state.en: The protective state approaches stabilization, but energy limitation may constrain CBF3-associated signaling.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞优先维持膜与蛋白稳态，细胞生长进一步受限。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells prioritize membrane and protein homeostasis as cellular growth becomes further restricted.

tissue.zh: 叶片进入节水型运行，光化学与气体交换同步受抑。
tissue.en: Leaves adopt a water-saving mode with coordinated suppression of photochemistry and gas exchange.

trait.zh: 叶片生长明显放缓，但严重萎蔫未必发生。
trait.en: Leaf growth slows clearly, although severe wilting may not yet occur.

text.zh: 叶龄与叶位差异未明确。
text.en: Leaf age and position are not specified.

state.zh: 若脱水继续加深，CBF3关联适应状态可能转向维持而非生长。
state.en: With deeper dehydration, the CBF3-associated state may shift toward maintenance rather than growth.

cell.zh: 细胞渗透调节接近高负荷，活性氧清除需求增加。
cell.en: Cellular osmotic adjustment approaches high demand, increasing the need for reactive-oxygen detoxification.

tissue.zh: 叶片导度维持低位，碳同化受到持续限制。
tissue.en: Leaf conductance remains low, imposing sustained limitation on carbon assimilation.

trait.zh: 叶面积增长停滞，卷曲或下垂可能更加明显。
trait.en: Leaf-area expansion stalls, and curling or drooping may become more apparent.

text.zh: 叶片温度是否稳定尚不清楚。
text.en: Whether leaf temperature remains stable is unclear.

state.zh: CBF3关联防护程序可能维持，但非特异性胁迫信号逐渐占优。
state.en: CBF3-associated protection may persist as nonspecific stress signals increasingly dominate.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞出现较高氧化负荷，修复与降解过程同时增强。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells experience higher oxidative load, with repair and degradation processes both increasing.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合效率下降，局部失水差异可能扩大。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic efficiency declines, and spatial differences in dehydration may widen.

trait.zh: 持续生长抑制伴随中度萎蔫风险。
trait.en: Persistent growth suppression is accompanied by a risk of moderate wilting.

text.zh: 叶内水分空间差异未知。
text.en: Spatial variation in leaf hydration is unknown.

state.zh: 胁迫强度上升可能削弱协调适应，使CBF3关联状态更具异质性。
state.en: Rising stress intensity may weaken coordinated acclimation and make the CBF3-associated state more heterogeneous.

cell.zh: 部分叶肉细胞维持稳态，另一些可能进入损伤前状态。
cell.en: Some mesophyll cells maintain homeostasis, while others may enter a pre-damage state.

tissue.zh: 叶片不同区域的气体交换与氧化压力进一步分化。
tissue.en: Gas exchange and oxidative pressure diverge further across leaf regions.

trait.zh: 卷曲与失绿风险增加，但程度取决于脱水速度。
trait.en: Risks of curling and chlorosis rise, with severity depending on dehydration rate.

text.zh: 细胞类型间响应差异尚未解析。
text.en: Cell-type-specific response differences remain unresolved.

state.zh: 长期脱水下，CBF3关联保护可能不足以抵消资源与氧化限制。
state.en: Under prolonged dehydration, CBF3-associated protection may not offset resource and oxidative constraints.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞修复负担增大，膜完整性开始面临风险。
cell.en: Mesophyll repair burden increases, placing membrane integrity at risk.

tissue.zh: 叶片水分与光合功能同步下降，恢复潜力可能受限。
tissue.en: Leaf hydration and photosynthetic function decline together, potentially limiting recovery capacity.

trait.zh: 萎蔫更明显，生物量增量接近停滞。
trait.en: Wilting becomes more evident, and biomass gain approaches stagnation.

text.zh: 组织损伤阈值尚未确定。
text.en: The tissue-damage threshold has not been determined.

state.zh: CBF3关联状态可能与衰老前信号重叠，但不等同于不可逆损伤。
state.en: The CBF3-associated state may overlap with pre-senescence signaling without implying irreversible damage.

cell.zh: 部分细胞维持防护，受压细胞则增强蛋白降解与抗氧化反应。
cell.en: Some cells retain protection, while stressed cells intensify proteolysis and antioxidant responses.

tissue.zh: 叶片功能呈斑块化下降，老叶区域可能更敏感。
tissue.en: Leaf function declines patchily, with older regions potentially more sensitive.

trait.zh: 失绿或边缘干缩可能出现，但并非必然。
trait.en: Chlorosis or marginal drying may appear, but neither is inevitable.

text.zh: 叶片发育年龄分布未知。
text.en: The distribution of leaf developmental ages is unknown.

state.zh: 末期状态由适应与损伤共同塑造，CBF3仅是其中一个分子读出。
state.en: The terminal state reflects both acclimation and damage, with CBF3 serving as only one molecular readout.

cell.zh: 存活细胞维持最低稳态，敏感细胞可能跨越可逆性边界。
cell.en: Surviving cells maintain minimal homeostasis, while sensitive cells may cross a reversibility boundary.

tissue.zh: 叶片水力与光合功能显著受限，组织异质性达到高水平。
tissue.en: Leaf hydraulic and photosynthetic functions are strongly constrained, with high tissue heterogeneity.

trait.zh: 植株表现明显生长停滞，并可能出现持续萎蔫或失绿。
trait.en: Plants show clear growth arrest and may develop persistent wilting or chlorosis.

text.zh: 末期叶水势与复水能力未知。
text.en: Terminal leaf water potential and rehydration capacity are unknown.

readouts.zh: 按时间测量CBF3转录本及代表性下游胁迫基因。
readouts.en: Measure CBF3 transcripts and representative downstream stress genes across time.

readouts.zh: 同步测量叶水势、相对含水量和气孔导度。
readouts.en: Measure leaf water potential, relative water content, and stomatal conductance concurrently.

readouts.zh: 检测叶绿素荧光、气体交换及活性氧负荷。
readouts.en: Assess chlorophyll fluorescence, gas exchange, and reactive-oxygen burden.

readouts.zh: 记录叶面积增长、卷曲、萎蔫和失绿程度。
readouts.en: Track leaf-area growth, curling, wilting, and chlorosis.

controls.zh: 设置同时间点、同光温条件的充分供水对照。
controls.en: Include time-matched well-watered controls under identical light and temperature.

controls.zh: 记录土壤含水量与叶水势以匹配实际胁迫强度。
controls.en: Record soil moisture and leaf water potential to match actual stress intensity.

controls.zh: 使用稳定内参并控制取样昼夜节律相位。
controls.en: Use stable reference genes and control circadian sampling phase.

title.zh: 这是CBF3关联的干旱复水状态轨迹。
title.en: This is a CBF3-associated drought–rewatering state trajectory.

geneFunction.zh: CBF3调控冷驯化基因并可标记重叠的脱水程序，但其信号不能单独证明因果。
geneFunction.en: CBF3 regulates cold-acclimation genes and can mark overlapping dehydration programs, but its signal alone does not establish causality.

state.zh: CBF3关联的冷驯化模块可能接近基线，而渗透与ABA信号开始增强。
state.en: The CBF3-associated cold module may remain near baseline while osmotic and ABA signaling begins rising.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞膨压略降，保卫细胞开始收缩气孔。
cell.en: Mesophyll turgor declines slightly, while guard cells begin restricting stomatal aperture.

tissue.zh: 叶片水力传导轻度受限，但碳同化大体维持。
tissue.en: Leaf hydraulic conductance becomes mildly constrained, while carbon assimilation remains largely maintained.

trait.zh: 叶片尚无明显萎蔫，扩展生长基本不变。
trait.en: The leaf shows no obvious wilting, and expansion remains largely unchanged.

text.zh: 叶温未知，限制了对CBF3募集程度的判断。
text.en: Unknown leaf temperature limits inference about CBF3 recruitment.

state.zh: CBF3可能被弱度且依情境募集，但这不能证明发生了冷响应。
state.en: CBF3 may be weakly and contextually recruited, without demonstrating a cold response.

cell.zh: 保卫细胞关闭增强，叶肉细胞启动渗透保护。
cell.en: Guard-cell closure strengthens, while mesophyll cells initiate osmoprotection.

tissue.zh: 气孔导度下降，叶片光合余量开始收窄。
tissue.en: Stomatal conductance declines, and the leaf photosynthetic reserve begins narrowing.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展可能轻微放缓，但尚无明显损伤。
trait.en: Leaf expansion may slow subtly, without visible injury.

text.zh: 起始昼夜节律相位未知，可能改变CBF3基线。
text.en: The unknown starting circadian phase may alter the CBF3 baseline.

state.zh: 持续缺水支持更广泛的胁迫程序，CBF3信号可能来自通路串扰。
state.en: Sustained water deficit supports broader stress programming, while any CBF3 signal may reflect pathway cross-talk.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞增强渗透调节与氧化还原缓冲，气孔保持受限。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells strengthen osmotic and redox buffering, while stomata remain restricted.

tissue.zh: 叶片水势继续下降，光合限制逐渐加深。
tissue.en: Leaf water potential continues falling, and photosynthetic limitation deepens.

trait.zh: 叶片可能出现初始且可逆的姿态下垂。
trait.en: The leaf may develop early, potentially reversible drooping.

text.zh: 实际干旱加深速率是主要未知条件。
text.en: The actual rate of drought progression is the main unknown.

state.zh: 复水先恢复供水，而CBF3关联转录物与蛋白不会立即复位。
state.en: Rewatering restores water supply before CBF3-associated transcripts and proteins can reset.

cell.zh: 细胞膨压开始回升，但ABA与氧化还原记忆仍在。
cell.en: Cellular turgor begins recovering, while ABA and redox memory persists.

tissue.zh: 叶片水力恢复启动，但气体交换仍明显滞后。
tissue.en: Leaf hydraulic recovery starts, but gas exchange remains delayed.

trait.zh: 萎蔫可能缓解，但叶片扩展仍受抑制。
trait.en: Wilting may ease, while leaf expansion remains suppressed.

text.zh: 复水速度与叶片内均一性尚不明确。
text.en: The speed and within-leaf uniformity of rehydration remain unclear.

state.zh: 若无低温刺激，CBF3关联信号应衰减，恢复程序逐渐占主导。
state.en: Without a cool cue, the CBF3-associated signal should decay as recovery programs become dominant.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞膨压回升，但残余ABA与活性氧信号仍可检测。
cell.en: Mesophyll turgor rebounds, while residual ABA and reactive oxygen signaling may remain detectable.

tissue.zh: 气孔导度部分恢复，叶片光合恢复可能不均一。
tissue.en: Stomatal conductance partially recovers, with heterogeneous photosynthetic recovery across the leaf.

trait.zh: 叶片姿态改善，但扩展生长仍有滞后。
trait.en: Leaf posture improves, but expansion growth remains delayed.

text.zh: 复水后的叶温变化可能重新塑造CBF3信号。
text.en: Post-rewatering leaf temperature may reshape the CBF3 signal.

state.zh: 因转录物或蛋白持续存在，CBF3靶标可能残留而非再次诱导。
state.en: CBF3 targets may persist through transcript or protein carryover rather than renewed induction.

cell.zh: 保卫细胞谨慎重开，叶肉细胞加强修复与代谢重排。
cell.en: Guard cells reopen cautiously, while mesophyll cells strengthen repair and metabolic rebalancing.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合能力继续回升，但尚未完全稳定。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic capacity continues recovering but is not fully stabilized.

trait.zh: 不再出现新萎蔫，但生长滞后仍可延续。
trait.en: No new wilting is expected, although growth delay may persist.

text.zh: CBF3蛋白在该条件下的周转速率未知。
text.en: CBF3 protein turnover under these conditions is unknown.

state.zh: CBF3模块趋近基线，但胁迫记忆可能维持部分染色质可及性。
state.en: The CBF3 module approaches baseline, while stress memory may preserve some chromatin accessibility.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞氧化还原状态趋稳，保卫细胞响应性重新校准。
cell.en: Mesophyll redox status stabilizes, while guard-cell responsiveness recalibrates.

tissue.zh: 叶片水力功能大致恢复，碳同化接近基线。
tissue.en: Leaf hydraulic function is largely restored, and carbon assimilation nears baseline.

trait.zh: 叶片恢复扩展，但可能进入较小的生长轨迹。
trait.en: Leaf expansion resumes, potentially along a smaller growth trajectory.

text.zh: 干旱是否造成不可逆细胞损伤尚不清楚。
text.en: Whether drought caused irreversible cellular damage remains unclear.

state.zh: 若无冷刺激，CBF3转录应接近日常基线，但下游记忆可能保留。
state.en: Without cold stimulation, CBF3 transcription should approach its routine baseline while downstream memory may remain.

cell.zh: 细胞膨压恢复，修复活动转向稳态代谢。
cell.en: Cellular turgor is restored, and repair activity shifts toward steady-state metabolism.

tissue.zh: 叶片气体交换接近基线，但生长资源分配尚未完全恢复。
tissue.en: Leaf gas exchange nears baseline, while growth allocation remains incompletely restored.

trait.zh: 叶片外观健康，但累积面积差异可能已形成。
trait.en: The leaf appears healthy, although a cumulative area deficit may have formed.

text.zh: 取样昼夜相位与对照是否匹配仍是关键歧义。
text.en: Diel phase matching between samples and controls remains the key ambiguity.

state.zh: 短暂程序大多消退，残余靶标更可能表示记忆而非持续驱动。
state.en: The transient program largely resolves, with residual targets more likely marking memory than sustained CBF3 drive.

cell.zh: 多数细胞接近基线，但仍可能保留部分渗透物。
cell.en: Most cells approach baseline while retaining some compatible osmolytes.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合功能恢复，但碳分配仍可能偏向储备补充。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthesis recovers, although carbon allocation may still favor reserve replenishment.

trait.zh: 叶片姿态正常，但扩展速率可能仍略慢。
trait.en: Leaf posture is normal, while expansion may remain slightly slower.

text.zh: 夜间最低叶温未知，可能影响残余CBF3活性。
text.en: Unknown nighttime leaf minima may influence residual CBF3 activity.

state.zh: CBF3状态应主要恢复温度与昼夜调控，先前干旱仅留弱痕迹。
state.en: CBF3 state should mainly resume temperature and diel regulation, with only weak drought carryover.

cell.zh: 保卫与叶肉细胞功能恢复，但部分细胞可能保持预激。
cell.en: Guard and mesophyll functions recover, although some cells may remain primed.

tissue.zh: 叶片水力与光合功能接近对照，储备继续补充。
tissue.en: Leaf hydraulics and photosynthesis approach controls while reserves continue replenishing.

trait.zh: 急性症状消失，但生长缺口可能继续存在。
trait.en: Acute symptoms disappear, but the growth deficit may persist.

text.zh: 叶龄与发育异质性可能掩盖恢复程度。
text.en: Leaf-age and developmental heterogeneity may obscure recovery.

state.zh: 若无低温或再次胁迫，预计CBF3不会持续升高。
state.en: Persistent CBF3 elevation is not expected without cooling or renewed stress.

cell.zh: 细胞稳态基本稳定，但预激细胞或可更快响应再次胁迫。
cell.en: Cellular homeostasis is stable, while primed cells may respond faster to renewed stress.

tissue.zh: 叶片功能接近对照，代谢储备逐步恢复。
tissue.en: Leaf function approaches controls as metabolic reserves are gradually restored.

trait.zh: 叶片大小差异可能保留，即使外观已正常。
trait.en: A leaf-size difference may remain despite a normal appearance.

text.zh: 复水后基质含水量是否稳定仍未知。
text.en: Post-rewatering substrate moisture stability remains unknown.

state.zh: 终点呈适应性恢复，CBF3接近基线而下游记忆仍可能存在。
state.en: The endpoint reflects adapted recovery, with near-baseline CBF3 and possible downstream memory.

cell.zh: 细胞稳态恢复，但少数细胞或保留表观与代谢预激。
cell.en: Cellular homeostasis is restored, although a subset may retain epigenetic or metabolic priming.

tissue.zh: 叶片生理功能恢复，但发育轨迹可能已发生偏移。
tissue.en: Leaf physiological function recovers, while its developmental trajectory may remain shifted.

trait.zh: 无急性胁迫表型，但可能留下轻度持久的生长滞后。
trait.en: No acute stress phenotype remains, but a modest lasting growth lag is possible.

text.zh: 完整叶温历史仍是解释CBF3状态的主要缺口。
text.en: The complete leaf-temperature history remains the main gap for interpreting CBF3 state.

readouts.zh: 连续定量CBF3转录物、蛋白及代表性冷响应与脱水靶标。
readouts.en: Quantify CBF3 RNA, CBF3 protein, and representative cold and dehydration targets across the full series.

readouts.zh: 在匹配时点测量叶水势、相对含水量、气孔导度与ABA。
readouts.en: Measure leaf water potential, relative water content, stomatal conductance, and ABA at matched horizons.

readouts.zh: 跟踪叶绿素荧光、碳同化、氧化还原状态、叶角与扩展速率。
readouts.en: Track chlorophyll fluorescence, carbon assimilation, redox status, leaf angle, and expansion rate.

controls.zh: 设置光照与温度相同的同期充分供水对照。
controls.en: Include a time-matched well-watered cohort under identical light and temperature.

controls.zh: 设置在干预时点后继续干旱的匹配组。
controls.en: Include a matched cohort that remains droughted beyond the intervention horizon.

controls.zh: 设置模拟操作对照并连续记录叶温与基质含水量。
controls.en: Use mock-handled controls and continuously log leaf temperature and substrate moisture.

title.zh: 持续冷胁迫下CBF3关联叶片状态轨迹
title.en: CBF3-associated leaf-state trajectory during sustained cold

geneFunction.zh: CBF3是受低温诱导的转录因子，关联耐寒程序及生长权衡。
geneFunction.en: CBF3 is a cold-responsive transcription factor associated with acclimation programs and growth tradeoffs.

state.zh: CBF3关联的早期冷信号启动，但强度受昼夜相位调节。
state.en: An early CBF3-associated cold program begins, with magnitude gated by circadian phase.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞启动核内转录响应，并初步调整氧化还原平衡。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells initiate nuclear transcriptional responses and begin adjusting redox balance.

tissue.zh: 叶片代谢开始转向保护，组织结构尚无明显改变。
tissue.en: Leaf metabolism shifts toward protection without clear structural change.

trait.zh: 外观大致维持基线，耐寒性尚未充分形成。
trait.en: Appearance remains near baseline, while cold tolerance is not yet fully established.

text.zh: 最关键未知是冷处理开始时的昼夜相位。
text.en: The key ambiguity is circadian phase when cold treatment began.

state.zh: CBF3关联转录程序扩展至脱水保护与膜稳定模块。
state.en: The CBF3-associated program expands toward dehydration protection and membrane stabilization.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞增加保护性蛋白与相容性溶质相关转录。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells increase transcripts linked to protective proteins and compatible solutes.

tissue.zh: 叶片开始稳定膜系统，并降低部分合成代谢需求。
tissue.en: Leaves begin stabilizing membranes while reducing some biosynthetic demand.

trait.zh: 可见生长变化仍弱，但后续叶片扩展可能放缓。
trait.en: Visible growth change remains slight, although later leaf expansion may slow.

text.zh: 最关键未知是实际冷处理温度。
text.en: The key missing condition is the actual cold-treatment temperature.

state.zh: CBF3关联状态进入强化期，并受光周期性碳供应影响。
state.en: The CBF3-associated state strengthens and becomes sensitive to photoperiodic carbon supply.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞协调糖信号、抗氧化能力与叶绿体保护。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells coordinate sugar signaling, antioxidant capacity, and chloroplast protection.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合装置受到保护，但碳同化能力可能暂降。
tissue.en: Photosynthetic machinery gains protection, although carbon assimilation may temporarily decline.

trait.zh: 植株仍保持完整，但生长与防护的权衡开始显现。
trait.en: Plants remain intact, but the growth-protection tradeoff begins to emerge.

text.zh: 最关键未知是处理期间的光强。
text.en: The key missing condition is light intensity during treatment.

state.zh: CBF3关联的耐寒转录网络趋于建立，而非单纯急性响应。
state.en: The CBF3-associated acclimation network becomes established beyond the initial acute response.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞维持膜保护、蛋白稳态与活性氧缓冲。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells sustain membrane protection, proteostasis, and reactive oxygen buffering.

tissue.zh: 叶片形成较协调的冷适应代谢，并限制扩展活动。
tissue.en: Leaves develop coordinated cold-acclimation metabolism while constraining expansion.

trait.zh: 耐寒潜力可能提高，同时叶片生长速度开始下降。
trait.en: Cold-tolerance potential may rise as leaf growth rate begins to decline.

text.zh: 最关键未知是所用叶片的发育年龄。
text.en: The key missing condition is developmental age of the sampled leaves.

state.zh: CBF3关联状态持续，但表达幅度可能随昼夜周期波动。
state.en: The CBF3-associated state persists, although expression magnitude may oscillate with the daily cycle.

cell.zh: 细胞保持保护性转录，同时重新分配糖和能量。
cell.en: Cells maintain protective transcription while reallocating sugars and energy.

tissue.zh: 叶片维持膜与叶绿体稳定，并降低扩张相关代谢。
tissue.en: Leaves maintain membrane and chloroplast stability while reducing expansion-related metabolism.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展放缓可能更明显，但未必出现损伤。
trait.en: Slower leaf expansion may become clearer without necessarily producing visible injury.

text.zh: 最关键未知是取样对应的昼夜时刻。
text.en: The key ambiguity is circadian time at sampling.

state.zh: CBF3关联程序转为维持型，急性信号的重要性下降。
state.en: The CBF3-associated program shifts toward maintenance as acute signaling becomes less dominant.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞加强代谢稳态，并限制高耗能生长活动。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells reinforce metabolic homeostasis and constrain energy-intensive growth.

tissue.zh: 叶片保护系统趋稳，光合效率可能部分恢复。
tissue.en: Leaf protective systems stabilize, and photosynthetic efficiency may partially recover.

trait.zh: 植株呈现适应性缓生，而非快速萎蔫。
trait.en: Plants show acclimatory slow growth rather than rapid wilting.

text.zh: 最关键未知是冷环境中的相对湿度。
text.en: The key missing condition is relative humidity during cold exposure.

state.zh: CBF3关联稳态继续支撑防护，但资源成本逐渐累积。
state.en: The CBF3-associated steady state continues supporting protection as resource costs accumulate.

cell.zh: 细胞维持抗氧化和膜稳态，同时压低增殖相关活动。
cell.en: Cells maintain antioxidant and membrane homeostasis while suppressing proliferation-related activity.

tissue.zh: 叶片保持功能完整，但新组织扩展受到持续限制。
tissue.en: Leaves remain functionally intact, while new tissue expansion stays constrained.

trait.zh: 耐冷表型可能增强，并伴随较小的叶面积增量。
trait.en: Cold tolerance may strengthen alongside reduced gains in leaf area.

text.zh: 最关键未知是基因型背景的冷敏感性。
text.en: The key ambiguity is cold sensitivity of the genetic background.

state.zh: CBF3关联网络接近适应平台，但仍受每日相位调节。
state.en: The CBF3-associated network approaches an acclimated plateau while remaining phase modulated.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞平衡碳利用、渗透保护与叶绿体修复。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells balance carbon use, osmoprotection, and chloroplast repair.

tissue.zh: 叶片在较低代谢通量下维持光合与膜功能。
tissue.en: Leaves preserve photosynthetic and membrane function at lower metabolic throughput.

trait.zh: 可见损伤预计有限，但生物量积累继续减慢。
trait.en: Visible injury is expected to remain limited, while biomass accumulation continues slowing.

text.zh: 最关键未知是冷处理温度是否存在波动。
text.en: The key ambiguity is whether cold temperature fluctuates.

state.zh: CBF3关联防护状态稳定，长期能量权衡成为主要特征。
state.en: The CBF3-associated protective state stabilizes, with long-term energy tradeoffs becoming prominent.

cell.zh: 细胞维持保护性代谢，并减少蛋白合成和生长投入。
cell.en: Cells sustain protective metabolism while reducing investment in protein synthesis and growth.

tissue.zh: 叶片功能得以保存，但扩张与更新速度进一步受限。
tissue.en: Leaf function is preserved, but expansion and renewal become further constrained.

trait.zh: 植株可能更耐冷，同时形成紧凑缓生的外观。
trait.en: Plants may become more cold tolerant while developing a compact, slow-growing appearance.

text.zh: 最关键未知是叶片初始碳储备。
text.en: The key missing condition is initial leaf carbon reserve.

state.zh: CBF3关联状态持续维持，部分靶程序可能发生反馈抑制。
state.en: The CBF3-associated state persists, while some target programs may undergo feedback attenuation.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞保持低温稳态，并避免过度活性氧积累。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells maintain cold homeostasis and limit excessive reactive oxygen accumulation.

tissue.zh: 叶片保护与光合需求达到新的动态平衡。
tissue.en: Leaf protection and photosynthetic demand reach a new dynamic balance.

trait.zh: 生长抑制趋于稳定，明显坏死仍非必然。
trait.en: Growth suppression tends to stabilize, while overt necrosis remains unlikely.

text.zh: 最关键未知是该温度是否接近损伤阈值。
text.en: The key ambiguity is proximity of temperature to the injury threshold.

state.zh: CBF3关联适应程序保持活跃，但边际防护增益可能减小。
state.en: The CBF3-associated acclimation program remains active, but additional protective gains may diminish.

cell.zh: 细胞优先维持膜、蛋白与叶绿体稳态。
cell.en: Cells prioritize membrane, protein, and chloroplast homeostasis.

tissue.zh: 叶片维持存活与光合能力，并持续牺牲扩展。
tissue.en: Leaves preserve viability and photosynthetic capacity while continuing to sacrifice expansion.

trait.zh: 耐冷状态趋稳，叶面积和生物量增量保持较低。
trait.en: Cold acclimation stabilizes, with leaf-area and biomass gains remaining low.

text.zh: 最关键未知是营养供应能否满足长期适应。
text.en: The key missing condition is whether nutrition supports prolonged acclimation.

state.zh: CBF3关联状态形成持续冷适应平台，并保留昼夜波动。
state.en: The CBF3-associated state forms a sustained acclimation plateau with residual circadian variation.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞维持低温保护稳态，而生长程序保持受限。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells maintain protective cold homeostasis while growth programs remain constrained.

tissue.zh: 叶片整体功能预计保存，但代谢与扩展处于低速状态。
tissue.en: Overall leaf function is expected to persist at reduced metabolic and expansion rates.

trait.zh: 最终表现可能是耐冷增强、损伤有限和持续缓生。
trait.en: The resulting phenotype may combine greater cold tolerance, limited injury, and sustained slow growth.

text.zh: 最关键未知是持续冷处理的确切温度。
text.en: The key missing condition is the exact sustained-cold temperature.

readouts.zh: 按昼夜时刻测量CBF3转录本及代表性冷响应靶基因。
readouts.en: Measure CBF3 transcripts and representative cold-response targets at matched circadian times.

readouts.zh: 检测叶绿素荧光、气体交换和叶片活性氧状态。
readouts.en: Assess chlorophyll fluorescence, gas exchange, and leaf reactive oxygen status.

readouts.zh: 测量电解质渗漏、渗透保护物和膜脂组成。
readouts.en: Measure electrolyte leakage, compatible solutes, and membrane lipid composition.

readouts.zh: 连续记录叶面积、鲜重及可见冷害。
readouts.en: Track leaf area, fresh mass, and visible cold injury over time.

controls.zh: 设置相同光周期与取样时刻的常温同基因型对照。
controls.en: Use same-genotype warm controls matched for photoperiod and sampling time.

controls.zh: 比较冷处理下cbf3缺失与遗传互补材料。
controls.en: Compare cold-treated cbf3 loss-of-function and genetically complemented lines.

controls.zh: 匹配叶龄、营养、湿度和初始叶片状态。
controls.en: Match leaf age, nutrition, humidity, and initial leaf state across groups.

title.zh: 正常供水下RD29A关联叶片状态轨迹。
title.en: RD29A-associated leaf-state trajectory under well-watered conditions.

geneFunction.zh: RD29A是整合ABA依赖与非依赖脱水程序的状态读出。
geneFunction.en: RD29A is a state readout integrating ABA-dependent and ABA-independent dehydration programs.

state.zh: RD29A预计维持低基础表达，并可能有时相波动。
state.en: RD29A likely remains basal, with possible phase-dependent variation.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞保持水合，未见持续脱水程序。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells remain hydrated without sustained dehydration programming.

tissue.zh: 叶片水分状态与气孔调节接近稳态。
tissue.en: Leaf water status and stomatal regulation remain near homeostasis.

trait.zh: 植株保持正常叶姿与营养生长。
trait.en: Plants retain normal leaf posture and vegetative growth.

text.zh: 起始授时因子时相未说明。
text.en: The starting Zeitgeber phase is unspecified.

state.zh: RD29A仍处基础范围，短暂波动不代表胁迫启动。
state.en: RD29A remains basal; transient variation would not establish stress activation.

cell.zh: 细胞膨压与ABA信号预计维持日常调节。
cell.en: Cell turgor and ABA signaling likely remain within routine regulation.

tissue.zh: 叶片蒸腾与补水预计保持平衡。
tissue.en: Leaf transpiration and water replacement likely remain balanced.

trait.zh: 叶片无可辨识萎蔫或生长抑制。
trait.en: Leaves show no discernible wilting or growth inhibition.

text.zh: 实际叶片水势尚未测量。
text.en: Actual leaf water potential is unmeasured.

state.zh: RD29A缺乏累积诱导，仍指向非胁迫状态。
state.en: RD29A lacks cumulative induction, supporting a non-stressed state.

cell.zh: 叶细胞维持渗透稳态与基础防御警戒。
cell.en: Leaf cells maintain osmotic homeostasis and basal defense readiness.

tissue.zh: 叶组织保持均一水合与正常气体交换。
tissue.en: Leaf tissue remains uniformly hydrated with normal gas exchange.

trait.zh: 冠层外观与叶片扩展预计正常。
trait.en: Canopy appearance and leaf expansion are expected to remain normal.

text.zh: 叶际蒸汽压亏缺未具体说明。
text.en: Leaf-level vapor-pressure deficit is unspecified.

state.zh: RD29A继续处于基础调控，可能叠加昼夜节律。
state.en: RD29A remains under basal regulation, potentially overlaid by diel rhythms.

cell.zh: 细胞未进入稳定的ABA或脱水响应状态。
cell.en: Cells do not enter a sustained ABA or dehydration-response state.

tissue.zh: 叶片导度与含水量预计维持稳态。
tissue.en: Leaf conductance and water content likely remain stable.

trait.zh: 未预测到胁迫相关叶卷曲或失绿。
trait.en: No stress-associated leaf curling or chlorosis is predicted.

text.zh: 采样时相相对光周期未知。
text.en: Sampling phase relative to the photoperiod is unknown.

state.zh: RD29A预计无持续上调，仅保留基础动态。
state.en: RD29A is not expected to rise persistently, retaining only basal dynamics.

cell.zh: 叶肉细胞保持膨压与常规转录稳态。
cell.en: Mesophyll cells preserve turgor and routine transcriptional homeostasis.

tissue.zh: 叶片水分供应继续匹配蒸腾需求。
tissue.en: Leaf water supply continues to match transpirational demand.

trait.zh: 营养生长轨迹预计与基线一致。
trait.en: Vegetative growth is expected to follow the baseline trajectory.

text.zh: 浇水均匀性尚未直接验证。
text.en: Watering uniformity has not been directly verified.

state.zh: RD29A关联状态仍为低胁迫警戒而非诱导。
state.en: The RD29A-associated state remains low-stress readiness rather than induction.

cell.zh: 细胞水分感知网络维持基础响应阈值。
cell.en: Cellular water-sensing networks retain baseline response thresholds.

tissue.zh: 整叶未出现脱水响应的空间扩展。
tissue.en: No spatial spread of dehydration responses develops across the leaf.

trait.zh: 叶面积增长与姿态预计保持正常。
trait.en: Leaf-area growth and posture are expected to remain normal.

text.zh: 叶龄分布未被精确限定。
text.en: The leaf-age distribution is not precisely defined.

state.zh: RD29A无累积激活，支持持续水分稳态。
state.en: RD29A shows no cumulative activation, supporting continued water homeostasis.

cell.zh: 细胞保持水合且不形成胁迫记忆样状态。
cell.en: Cells remain hydrated without developing a stress-memory-like state.

tissue.zh: 叶片气孔与维管供水保持协调。
tissue.en: Stomatal behavior and vascular water supply remain coordinated.

trait.zh: 植株继续表现无萎蔫的正常生长。
trait.en: Plants continue normal growth without wilting.

text.zh: 局部根区含水量尚未监测。
text.en: Local root-zone water content is unmonitored.

state.zh: RD29A仍处低基础区间，时相差异可能持续。
state.en: RD29A remains in a low basal range, with phase differences still possible.

cell.zh: 叶细胞维持渗透平衡与低ABA张力。
cell.en: Leaf cells maintain osmotic balance and low ABA tone.

tissue.zh: 叶组织水合度与光合能力预计稳定。
tissue.en: Leaf hydration and photosynthetic capacity are expected to remain stable.

trait.zh: 未预测到叶片早衰或扩展减缓。
trait.en: No premature senescence or slowed leaf expansion is predicted.

text.zh: 起始昼夜节律相位仍不明确。
text.en: The initial circadian phase remains unresolved.

state.zh: RD29A继续缺乏持续脱水型表达特征。
state.en: RD29A continues to lack a sustained dehydration-like expression pattern.

cell.zh: 细胞未跨越诱导强脱水程序的阈值。
cell.en: Cells do not cross the threshold for strong dehydration programming.

tissue.zh: 叶片维持正常蒸腾与组织膨压。
tissue.en: Leaves maintain normal transpiration and tissue turgor.

trait.zh: 可见表型预计仍与正常供水基线一致。
trait.en: Visible phenotype remains consistent with the well-watered baseline.

text.zh: 环境湿度的短时波动未知。
text.en: Short-term humidity fluctuations are unknown.

state.zh: RD29A关联转录状态保持基础且无漂移。
state.en: The RD29A-associated transcriptional state remains basal without drift.

cell.zh: 细胞持续维持膨压与常规代谢分配。
cell.en: Cells continue maintaining turgor and routine metabolic allocation.

tissue.zh: 叶片供水、蒸腾与气孔响应保持耦合。
tissue.en: Leaf water supply, transpiration, and stomatal responses remain coupled.

trait.zh: 生长速率与叶色预计保持正常范围。
trait.en: Growth rate and leaf color likely remain within normal ranges.

text.zh: 叶温相对气温尚未测定。
text.en: Leaf temperature relative to air remains unmeasured.

state.zh: RD29A仍作为未激活脱水程序的基础读出。
state.en: RD29A remains a basal readout of unactivated dehydration programs.

cell.zh: 叶细胞保持稳态，不见持续ABA放大。
cell.en: Leaf cells remain homeostatic without sustained ABA amplification.

tissue.zh: 整叶水分状态预计无进行性下降。
tissue.en: Whole-leaf water status shows no expected progressive decline.

trait.zh: 植株预计无累积性水分胁迫表型。
trait.en: Plants are not expected to accumulate water-stress phenotypes.

text.zh: 个体间蒸腾差异尚未量化。
text.en: Between-plant transpiration variation is unquantified.

state.zh: RD29A维持低基础状态，未形成延迟诱导。
state.en: RD29A remains low and basal without delayed induction.

cell.zh: 细胞水合与胁迫信号阈值保持稳定。
cell.en: Cell hydration and stress-signaling thresholds remain stable.

tissue.zh: 叶片保持水分稳态与正常功能整合。
tissue.en: Leaves preserve water homeostasis and normal functional integration.

trait.zh: 七十二小时表型预计持续接近基线。
trait.en: The final phenotype is expected to remain close to baseline.

text.zh: 末次采样的昼夜时相未指定。
text.en: The final sampling phase is unspecified.

readouts.zh: 用RT-qPCR或报告基因追踪RD29A时序表达。
readouts.en: Track RD29A expression over time using RT-qPCR or a reporter.

readouts.zh: 同步测量叶片水势、相对含水量与气孔导度。
readouts.en: Measure leaf water potential, relative water content, and stomatal conductance concurrently.

readouts.zh: 检测ABA水平及代表性依赖与非依赖标记。
readouts.en: Assay ABA and representative ABA-dependent and ABA-independent markers.

readouts.zh: 记录叶温、叶面积、叶姿与叶绿素荧光。
readouts.en: Record leaf temperature, area, posture, and chlorophyll fluorescence.

controls.zh: 使用同基因型、同叶龄及同时相的正常供水对照。
controls.en: Use well-watered controls matched for genotype, leaf age, and sampling phase.

controls.zh: 加入温和脱水或ABA处理作为响应阳性对照。
controls.en: Include mild dehydration or ABA treatment as a response-positive control.

controls.zh: 设置无逆转录与无模板对照验证表达检测。
controls.en: Include no-reverse-transcriptase and no-template controls for expression assays.

title.zh: 持续干旱下RD29A关联状态轨迹。
title.en: RD29A-associated state trajectory under progressive drought.

geneFunction.zh: RD29A是脱水响应探针，整合ABA依赖与非依赖程序，但其表达不证明因果。
geneFunction.en: RD29A probes dehydration-responsive ABA-dependent and independent programs, but its expression does not establish causality.

state.zh: RD29A可能开始响应轻度脱水信号。
state.en: RD29A may begin responding to mild dehydration signals.

cell.zh: 叶细胞感知水势下降并启动早期胁迫转录。
cell.en: Leaf cells sense declining water potential and initiate early stress transcription.

tissue.zh: 叶片含水状态略降，但整体结构仍接近基线。
tissue.en: Leaf hydration declines slightly while overall structure remains near baseline.

trait.zh: 可见生长和叶片姿态预计基本不变。
trait.en: Visible growth and leaf posture likely remain largely unchanged.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是早期土壤失水速率。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the early soil drying rate.

state.zh: RD29A转录可能随ABA与脱水通路汇合而增强。
state.en: RD29A transcription may strengthen as ABA and dehydration pathways converge.

cell.zh: 保卫细胞和叶肉细胞进入节水型应答。
cell.en: Guard and mesophyll cells enter a water-conserving response.

tissue.zh: 气孔导度开始下降，叶片失水受到限制。
tissue.en: Stomatal conductance begins declining, limiting further leaf water loss.

trait.zh: 生长减缓可能先于明显萎蔫出现。
trait.en: Growth slowing may precede visible wilting.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是空气湿度与蒸汽压亏缺。
text.en: The main uncertainty is humidity and vapor pressure deficit.

state.zh: RD29A可能标记已建立的脱水防御转录状态。
state.en: RD29A may mark an established dehydration-defense transcriptional state.

cell.zh: 细胞增强渗透保护并进一步限制扩张。
cell.en: Cells enhance osmoprotection while further restricting expansion.

tissue.zh: 叶片水势下降，光合碳同化开始受限。
tissue.en: Leaf water potential falls as photosynthetic carbon assimilation becomes constrained.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展减慢，但明显损伤仍不预期。
trait.en: Leaf expansion slows, although overt injury is not yet expected.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是叶龄及发育状态。
text.en: The main uncertainty is leaf age and developmental status.

state.zh: RD29A可能保持较强表达，反映持续水分亏缺。
state.en: RD29A may remain strongly expressed, reflecting sustained water deficit.

cell.zh: 叶细胞维持ABA信号、渗透调节和生长抑制。
cell.en: Leaf cells maintain ABA signaling, osmotic adjustment, and growth restraint.

tissue.zh: 叶片蒸腾和光合作用进一步下降。
tissue.en: Leaf transpiration and photosynthesis decline further.

trait.zh: 轻度卷曲或短暂萎蔫可能开始出现。
trait.en: Mild curling or transient wilting may begin to appear.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是初始昼夜节律采样相位。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the initial circadian sampling phase.

state.zh: RD29A持续激活可能表示防御状态已占优势。
state.en: Persistent RD29A activation may indicate that defense programs now predominate.

cell.zh: 细胞将资源从扩张转向稳态维持。
cell.en: Cells redirect resources from expansion toward homeostatic maintenance.

tissue.zh: 叶肉代谢受限，叶片温度可能因蒸腾下降而升高。
tissue.en: Mesophyll metabolism is constrained, and reduced transpiration may raise leaf temperature.

trait.zh: 植株生长抑制与叶片卷曲可能更明显。
trait.en: Growth inhibition and leaf curling may become more apparent.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是叶片实际ABA积累程度。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the actual degree of leaf ABA accumulation.

state.zh: RD29A可能维持高响应，但细胞间表达趋于异质。
state.en: RD29A may remain highly responsive while expression becomes heterogeneous across cells.

cell.zh: 较受压细胞强化保护，较轻受压细胞维持代谢。
cell.en: More stressed cells reinforce protection while less stressed cells preserve metabolism.

tissue.zh: 叶片水分梯度扩大，局部光合能力下降。
tissue.en: Hydration gradients widen across the leaf, with localized photosynthetic decline.

trait.zh: 日间萎蔫可能增强，夜间恢复变得不完全。
trait.en: Daytime wilting may intensify, with increasingly incomplete overnight recovery.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是不同叶细胞类型的响应差异。
text.en: The main uncertainty is response variation among leaf cell types.

state.zh: RD29A可能接近持续诱导平台并反映慢性脱水。
state.en: RD29A may approach a sustained induction plateau reflecting chronic dehydration.

cell.zh: 细胞维持渗透保护，同时能量和还原力受限。
cell.en: Cells sustain osmoprotection while energy and reducing power become limited.

tissue.zh: 气孔长期关闭使碳获取和蒸腾冷却受抑。
tissue.en: Prolonged stomatal closure suppresses carbon gain and transpirational cooling.

trait.zh: 叶片扩展显著受限，植株呈紧凑状态。
trait.en: Leaf expansion becomes strongly restricted, producing a more compact plant.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是叶片是否已达到水力阈值。
text.en: The main uncertainty is whether leaves have crossed a hydraulic threshold.

state.zh: RD29A高表达可能持续，但不再与胁迫强度线性对应。
state.en: High RD29A expression may persist without scaling linearly with stress severity.

cell.zh: 部分细胞维持适应，敏感细胞开始出现氧化负担。
cell.en: Some cells maintain acclimation while sensitive cells develop oxidative burden.

tissue.zh: 叶片光合效率下降，组织复水能力可能减弱。
tissue.en: Leaf photosynthetic efficiency declines, and tissue rehydration capacity may weaken.

trait.zh: 持续卷曲和明显萎蔫的可能性增加。
trait.en: Persistent curling and conspicuous wilting become more likely.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是根系可利用的残余水分。
text.en: The main uncertainty is residual water available to roots.

state.zh: RD29A可能标记慢性防御与代谢受限并存的状态。
state.en: RD29A may mark coexistence of chronic defense and metabolic limitation.

cell.zh: 叶细胞优先维持膜与蛋白稳态而减少合成活动。
cell.en: Leaf cells prioritize membrane and protein homeostasis while reducing biosynthesis.

tissue.zh: 叶片水势持续偏低，局部衰老信号可能出现。
tissue.en: Leaf water potential remains low, and localized senescence signals may emerge.

trait.zh: 生物量积累明显放缓，老叶可能失去挺度。
trait.en: Biomass accumulation slows markedly, and older leaves may lose rigidity.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是基因型的干旱适应能力。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the genotype's drought acclimation capacity.

state.zh: RD29A可能继续升高或平台化，取决于细胞活力。
state.en: RD29A may remain elevated or plateau depending on cellular viability.

cell.zh: 存活细胞维持保护程序，受损细胞转向修复或衰老。
cell.en: Viable cells sustain protection while damaged cells shift toward repair or senescence.

tissue.zh: 光合组织功能进一步下降，膜损伤风险上升。
tissue.en: Photosynthetic tissue function declines further as membrane injury risk rises.

trait.zh: 萎蔫可能持续，恢复潜力开始明显下降。
trait.en: Wilting may persist as recovery potential begins to decline.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是此时干旱的实际严重度。
text.en: The main uncertainty is the actual drought severity at this stage.

state.zh: RD29A信号可能保持较高，但组织异质性进一步扩大。
state.en: RD29A signaling may remain high while tissue heterogeneity increases further.

cell.zh: 耐受细胞保持稳态，脆弱细胞可能失去膨压。
cell.en: Tolerant cells preserve homeostasis while vulnerable cells may lose turgor.

tissue.zh: 叶缘或老叶区域可能优先出现功能衰退。
tissue.en: Leaf margins or older regions may show functional decline first.

trait.zh: 持续萎蔫和早期黄化的风险增加。
trait.en: Risks of persistent wilting and early yellowing increase.

text.zh: 最大不确定性是叶片区域间的水力差异。
text.en: The main uncertainty is hydraulic variation among leaf regions.

state.zh: RD29A可能标记长期脱水状态，但表达受活力限制。
state.en: RD29A may mark prolonged dehydration, although expression becomes limited by viability.

cell.zh: 存活细胞维持残余防御，严重受压细胞进入衰老。
cell.en: Surviving cells retain residual defenses while severely stressed cells enter senescence.

tissue.zh: 叶片功能显著受限，并可能出现不可逆局部损伤。
tissue.en: Leaf function is strongly constrained, with possible irreversible localized injury.

trait.zh: 植株明显矮化萎蔫，恢复能力可能不完整。
trait.en: Plants appear stunted and wilted, with potentially incomplete recovery capacity.
